zh.Kirk Hammerton, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾柯克 哈莫頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Grace Hamerton於1420年出生在英國越可爾柯克 哈莫頓時，她的父親Sir Laurence Hamerton40歲，母親Isabel Tempest37歲。她於1445年之前與Sir John Pudsey在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1468年9月在英國英格蘭越可爾享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Grace Hamerton于1420年出生在英国越可爾柯克 哈莫頓时，她的父亲Sir Laurence Hamerton40岁，母亲Isabel Tempest37岁。她于1445年之前与Sir John Pudsey在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1468年9月在英国英格兰越可爾享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hamerton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Hammerton
meanings: English: habitational name, usually from Hammerton Green (Yorkshire) and occasionally perhaps from Hamerton (Huntingdonshire), each of which probably derives from Old English hamor, denoting some sort of plant such as hammer-wort, + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Grace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the abstract noun (via Old French, from Latin gratia), this name occurs occasionally in the 15th century, and by the 1540s was among the most popular girls' names in some parishes. It has always been particularly popular in Scotland and northern England (borne, for example, by Grace Darling , the lighthouse keeper's daughter whose heroism in 1838 , saving sailors in a storm, caught the popular imagination). In more recent times it was famous as the name of the actress Grace Kelly ( 1928–82 ), who became Princess Grace of Monaco. In Ireland it is used as an Anglicized form of Gráinne .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Grace Hamerton was born in 1420, in Kirk Hammerton, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir Laurence Hamerton, was 40 and her mother, Isabel Tempest, was 37. She married Sir John Pudsey before 1445, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in September 1468, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Grace Hamerton est née en 1420, à Kirk Hammerton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Laurence Hamerton, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Isabel Tempest, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Pudsey avant 1445, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en septembre 1468, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Grace Hamerton 1420 in Kirk Hammerton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Laurence Hamerton 40 und ihre Mutter Isabel Tempest 37. Sie hat vor 1445 in Yorkshire, England Sir John Pudsey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb im September 1468 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Grace Hamerton è nata il nel 1420 nel Kirk Hammerton, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Sir Laurence Hamerton, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Isabel Tempest, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Pudsey prima del 1445, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel settembre 1468, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.Kirk Hammerton, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアキルク ハンマートン
ja.lifeSummary: Grace Hamertonが1420年にイギリスヨークシュアイアキルク ハンマートンで生まれた時，父Sir Laurence Hamertonは40歳，母Isabel Tempestは37歳であった。1445年以前にイギリスヨークシュアイアでSir John Pudseyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1468年9月にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Grace Hamerton(이)가 1420년 영국 요르크실르 커크 해머턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Laurence Hamerton(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Tempest(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1445년 이전 영국 요르크실르에서 Sir John Pudsey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1468년 9월 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Grace Hamerton nasceu em 1420, em Kirk Hammerton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Laurence Hamerton, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Tempest, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Pudsey antes 1445, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em setembro de 1468, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Grace Hamerton родилась в 1420 г. в местности кирк хаммиртон, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Laurence Hamerton было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Tempest, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Pudsey перед 1445 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла сентябрь 1468 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Grace Hamerton nació en 1420, en Kirk Hammerton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Laurence Hamerton, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Isabel Tempest, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Sir John Pudsey antes de 1445, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en septiembre de 1468, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 48 años.
